title: senecio canescens
intro: Senecio canescens, also known as woolly groundsel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio canescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Senecio canescens can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
